caption: The video depicts a man standing at a podium, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal setting, possibly a conference or seminar. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest and has his hair tied back. The man is speaking into a microphone, gesturing with his hands as he communicates, indicating that he is likely delivering a speech or presentation. The audience, seated in front of him, consists of people with various hairstyles and attire, suggesting a diverse group. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, adding to the professional atmosphere of the event. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, which might indicate the organization or event name.
